title: Sales Administrator (International / Steel Trading)
description:
About the role
This full-time Sales Administrator (International / Steel Trading) role at Regency Steel Asia Pte Ltd offers an exciting opportunity to join a leading steel trading company based in the heart of Tanjong Pagar. In this position, you will be responsible for providing comprehensive administrative support to the international sales team, ensuring the smooth and efficient handling of all sales-related processes.

What you'll be doing

Trading & Sales Support

  1. Support traders and sales teams with trade execution, daily operations, and order management.  Ensure Purchase and Sales contracts are properly prepared in accordance with agreed term, including pre-costing and commission agreement etc.

  2. Handle trade documentation processing and Letters of Credit (LC) negotiation, ensuring compliance with collection instructions and smooth encashment of L/C proceeds.

  3. Follow up L/C status and shipment schedules, and keep customers informed of shipment progress.

  4. Monitor payment due dates closely and liaise with buyers or inform the trader in charge to ensure timely payments follow-up.

  5. Monitor trading limits, exposures, and P&L movements.

  6. Assist to compile and prepare all periodic reports when required.

  7. Ensure all trades comply with internal policies and regulatory requirements.

  8. Complete physical and e-filing after transaction are shipped and completed.

  9. Provide administrative and operational support to the trading and sales teams when required.

Client & Relationship Support

  1. Establish and maintain effective communication and relationship with concerned parties including all stakeholders, suppliers, customers, agent, bank, insurance company etc.

  2. Appoint and coordinate with third party surveyors to ensure proper loading and discharging of cargo, when required.

  3. Communicate and update all contractual changes on the relevant parties timely in accordance with inhouse policies.

What we're looking for

  1. Bachelor’s degree in finance, Business, or a related field.

  2. Two to five (2-5) years of experience in trading support of Steel Product Business, sales support, or trading desk operations.

  3. Familiarity with trading platforms and systems.

  4. Strong analytical and numerical skills.

  5. High attention to detail and accuracy.

  6. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

  7. Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment.

  8. Strong coordination skills across sales, trading, and operations teams.

  9. Proficiency in MS Excel and reporting tool.

About us
Regency Steel Asia Pte Ltd is a leading international steel trading company with a strong presence in the Asia-Pacific region. Established in 1995, we pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction. With a diverse portfolio of steel products and a team of industry experts, we have built a reputation as a trusted partner to our clients worldwide.
